scenarios.name: mild_revenue_stress
scenarios.description: Revenue declines 10 % due to demand softness

scenarios.name: moderate_combined_stress
scenarios.description: Revenue down 15 %, margin compressed 3 pp, capex up 20 %

scenarios.name: severe_recession
scenarios.description: Revenue down 20 %, margin compressed 5 pp, rates up 200 bps

scenarios.name: rate_shock_only
scenarios.description: Rates increase 300 bps with flat revenues
